Visualization Gallery

Source: vignettes/visualization-gallery.Rmd
visualization-gallery.Rmd

Overview

scMMR includes 18+ publication-ready visualization functions. This gallery provides a quick reference for each function with usage examples.

Composition & Flow

PlotRoe – O/E Ratio Heatmap

Observed/Expected ratio heatmap highlighting cell type enrichment per group.

# Numeric values
PlotRoe(seu, by = "group", fill = "cell_type")

# Grade symbols (+++ / ++ / + / +/- / -)
PlotRoe(seu, by = "group", fill = "cell_type", display = "symbol")

# With significance stars
PlotRoe(seu, by = "group", fill = "cell_type",
        show.pvalue = TRUE, p.method = "chisq")

# Both value + symbol
PlotRoe(seu, by = "group", fill = "cell_type",
        display = "both", show.pvalue = TRUE)

Key parameters: by, fill, palette, display (“value”/“symbol”/“both”), show.pvalue, p.method (“chisq”/“fisher”), return.data

PlotAlluvia – Stacked Area + Bar Chart

Cell type composition as stacked areas and bar charts across groups.

PlotAlluvia(seu, by = "group", fill = "cell_type")

# Customize
PlotAlluvia(seu, by = "group", fill = "cell_type",
            show.pct = TRUE, show.label = TRUE,
            bar.width = 0.8, flow.alpha = 0.5)

Key parameters: by, fill, colors, palette, flow.alpha, bar.width, show.label, show.pct

PlotSankey – Sankey Flow Diagram

Alluvial-style Sankey diagram for cell transitions.

PlotSankey(seu, by = "group", fill = "cell_type")

PlotSankey(seu, by = "group", fill = "cell_type",
           curve.type = "spline", show.pct = TRUE)

Key parameters: Same as PlotAlluvia plus curve.type (“linear”/“spline”)

Projection & Spatial

PlotMAP – UMAP Projection

Overlay query predictions on reference UMAP background.

PlotMAP(
  ref       = ref_umap_df,
  query_meta = seu@meta.data,
  color_by  = "cell_type_pred",
  ref_emb   = c("umap_1", "umap_2"),
  query_emb = c("umap_pred_1", "umap_pred_2")
)

Key parameters: ref, query_meta, ref_emb, query_emb, color_by, facet_by, colors, density.color

PlotScatter – General Scatter Plot

Flexible scatter plot for embeddings or feature-feature comparisons.

PlotScatter(seu, reduction = "umap", color.by = "cell_type")

PlotScatter(seu, features = c("gene_A", "gene_B"),
            group.by = "cell_type")

Key parameters: reduction, features, group.by, split.by, color.by, colors, base_size

PlotAnnotation – Cell Annotation Heatmap

Summary heatmap with automatic color coding for metadata columns.

PlotAnnotation(seu, which = c("cell_type", "group", "confidence"))

Key parameters: which, palette, row_order, col_order, base_size

Gene Importance & Ranking

PlotImportance – Gene Importance Chart

Lollipop or bar chart of gene importance from Integrated Gradients.

# Global importance
PlotImportance(result$imp_global, top_k = 30, display = "lollipop")

# Per-class importance
PlotImportance(result$imp_per_class, top_k = 15, display = "bar")

Key parameters: top_k, display (“lollipop”/“bar”), palette, base_size

PlotRankScatter – Rank Scatter Plot

Generic scatter for visualizing feature scores (gene importance, module scores, pathway NES).

PlotRankScatter(scores_df, x_label = "Gene", y_label = "Importance",
                highlight = top_genes, label.top_k = 10)

Key parameters: x_label, y_label, show_line, highlight, label.top_k, colors

Perturbation & Abundance

PlotPerturbation – Perturbation Score Chart

Ranked chart of perturbation scores with significance markers.

PlotPerturbation(perturb_result, top_k = 10, display = "lollipop")
PlotPerturbation(perturb_result, display = "bar", sig_threshold = 0.05)

Key parameters: top_k, display (“lollipop”/“bar”), sig_threshold, palette, base_size

PlotPercent – Differential Abundance Beeswarm

miloR-style beeswarm plot of per-neighborhood logFC.

PlotPercent(da_result, fdr_threshold = 0.1)
PlotPercent(da_result, show_boxplot = TRUE, point_size = 1.5)

Key parameters: fdr_threshold, colors, show_boxplot, base_size, point_size

Differential Expression

PlotDE – DE Dot Plot / Volcano 

# Dot plot
PlotDE(de_results, type = "dot", top_n = 8)

# Volcano plot
PlotDE(de_results, type = "volcano", logfc.cutoff = 1, label = TRUE)

Key parameters: type (“dot”/“volcano”), top_n, top_by, logfc.cutoff, pval.cutoff, label

PlotGsea – GSEA Bubble Plot 

PlotGsea(gsea_results, top.n = 10)
PlotGsea(gsea_results, facet_by = "sign", order_by = "NES")

Key parameters: top.n, order_by, use.padj, facet_by, colors

Pathway & Enrichment

PlotPathwayBubble – Pathway Enrichment Bubble 

PlotPathwayBubble(pathway_results, top.n = 10)

PlotPathwayBubble(pathway_results, top.n = 15,
                   size.by = "pvalue", facet.by.sign = TRUE)

Key parameters: top.n, size.by, pvalue.cutoff, select.by, order.by, facet.by.sign, colors

Correlation

PlotCorrelation – Correlation Scatter

Volcano-style plot: -log10(p) vs correlation coefficient.

PlotCorrelation(cor_results, p.cutoff = 0.05, cor.cutoff = 0.3,
                label = TRUE, label.n = 10)

Key parameters: use.padj, p.cutoff, cor.cutoff, label, label.n

PlotPropCorrelation – Proportion Correlation Heatmap 

PlotPropCorrelation(seu, emb.cols = paste0("DNN_", 1:10),
                     prop.data = proportions, method = "spearman")

Key parameters: emb.cols, prop.data, method, group.by, base_size

Trajectory & Potency

PlotCytoTRACE2 – Cellular Potency Plot

Violin + box + jitter plot of CytoTRACE2 scores grouped by cell type.

PlotCytoTRACE2(seu, group.by = "cell_type",
               score = "CytoTRACE2_Score", order = TRUE)

Key parameters: group.by, score, order, colors, base_size

PlotDynamicFeatures – Feature Dynamics Along Pseudotime 

PlotDynamicFeatures(seu, features = c("gene_A", "gene_B"),
                     pseudotime_col = "pseudotime",
                     method = "loess")

Key parameters: features, pseudotime_col, method (“loess”/“gam”), group.by, colors

Embedding Quality

PlotEmbeddingEval – Embedding Evaluation Diagnostics

Five-panel diagnostic plot for DNN embedding quality.

eval_result <- EvaluateEmbedding(embedding, seurat_obj = seu)

# All plots
PlotEmbeddingEval(eval_result, which = "all")

# Individual plots
PlotEmbeddingEval(eval_result, which = "elbow")
PlotEmbeddingEval(eval_result, which = "knn")
PlotEmbeddingEval(eval_result, which = "silhouette")

Key parameters: which (“all”/“elbow”/“cumvar”/“knn”/“distcor”/“silhouette”), base_size

Color Palettes

palette_colors – Generate Color Vectors 

# Automatic palette for a character vector
cols <- palette_colors(cell_types)

# Specific palette
cols <- palette_colors(n = 8, palette = "Set2")

# Continuous palette
cols <- palette_colors(n = 100, type = "continuous", palette = "RdYlBu")

show_palettes – Display Available Palettes 

# Show all discrete palettes
show_palettes(type = "discrete")

# Show specific palettes
show_palettes(palette_names = c("Set2", "Paired", "lancet"))

Available palettes: All RColorBrewer palettes + ggsci palettes (lancet, nejm, jama, jco, d3, etc.) + custom scMMR palettes.

On this page
